title: croton astianus
intro: Croton astianus, also known as the croton or Bastard croton, is a plant species within the spurge family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Croton astianus include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and providing relief from pain and discomfort. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves or roots may be used to create teas, tinctures, or salves for medicinal purposes.
